节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the accounts of the enterprise devices.
Disallow the user of device add local account. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the user is not allowed to add local account.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - the callback of disallowAddLocalAccount.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
true if the user is not allowed to add local account.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.

节点.功能描述: Disallow the user of device add local account. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the user is not allowed to add local account.
@returns { Promise<void> } the promise returned by the disallowAddLocalAccount.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
true if the user is not allowed to add local account.

节点.return_description: the promise returned by the disallowAddLocalAccount.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.

节点.功能描述: Disallows the user to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { number } userId - indicates the user ID.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.
true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.

节点.功能描述: Queries whether the user is disallowed to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { number } userId - indicates the user ID.
@returns { boolean } true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.

节点.return_description: true if the specific user is not allowed to add an OS account.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.

节点.功能描述: Adds an OS account using the name and account type. This function can be called by a super administrator.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the administrator ability information.
@param { string } name - the OS account name.
@param { osAccount.OsAccountType } type - the OS account type.
@returns { osAccount.OsAccountInfo } information about the OS account added.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - the application is not an administrator of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9201003 - failed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - the application does not have permission to call this function.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the administrator ability information.

节点.return_description: information about the OS account added.

error_codes.description: the application is not an administrator of the device.
the administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
failed to add an OS account.
the application does not have permission to call this function.
not system application.
invalid input parameter.
